verses.1: “When Israel was a child, then I loved him,
verses.2: They called to them, so they went from them.
verses.3: Yet I taught Ephraim to walk.
verses.4: I drew them with cords of a man, with ties of love;
verses.5: “They won’t return into the land of Egypt;
verses.6: The sword will fall on their cities,
verses.7: My people are determined to turn from me.
verses.8: “How can I give you up, Ephraim?
verses.9: I will not execute the fierceness of my anger.
verses.10: They will walk after the LORD,
verses.11: They will come trembling like a bird out of Egypt,
